race.comment: ROBRICK (10) doesn't win out of turn but got the job done comfortably last time out over today's journey at Ipswich. Steps up to Saturday company which has tested him this prep. Confidence back so might go on with it now. NORTH POLE (3) impressed first-up at the Gold Coast then failed to finish at the Sunshine Coast most recently. Consistent gelding with a good record at this trip so he can bounce back. JOHN RAMBO (1) has been competitive at stakes level in his two runs this time in work. No surprise if he took this out. POCKETMONEY (13) has struck form with a win and a close second from the past two outings. Hitting the line with gusto and is one to watch for late in the piece again. BLUEPINOT (6) disappointed last start but can turn things around without surprising with the help of the inside alley.
